svg.title: Role-Based Prompting — ABTalks 60-Day Claude AI Mastery Challenge
svg.desc: A square LinkedIn post graphic explaining role-based prompting. Brown, beige, and cream palette. Shows a side-by-side comparison: without role prompt gives a generic answer, with role prompt gives an expert-level answer. Five persona cards: Developer, Product Manager, HR Manager, Founder, Marketer.
svg.text: ABTALKS · 60-DAY CLAUDE AI MASTERY CHALLENGE · DAY 07
Turn Claude into any expert you need
ASSIGN A PERSONA · GET AN EXPERT
"You are a senior UX designer with 10 years in fintech."
"You are an experienced HR manager at a fast-growing startup."
